title: Scan a barcode
hint: Point your camera at a product barcode, or type it in manually, to look up its nutrition.
unavailable: The food lookup service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a moment.
invalidBarcode: Please enter a valid numeric barcode.
noCamera: No camera is available in this browser. Enter the barcode manually below.
pointCamera: Point your camera at a barcode…

cameraErrors.permissionDenied: Camera permission was denied. Enable it in your browser settings, or enter the barcode manually below.
cameraErrors.notFound: No camera was found. Please enter the barcode manually below.
cameraErrors.inUse: The camera is already in use by another application.
cameraErrors.generic: Could not start the camera. Please enter the barcode manually below.
